data.title: KernelDAO: Tokens are now live and available for airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: KernelDAO published a post on the X platform stating that the KERNEL token is now officially online and open for airdrops. Currently, multiple CEXs have confirmed that KERNEL will be launched, and more trading platforms will join in the future.

data.title: Musk: Soon AI will far surpass the best human beings in reasoning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk said that soon artificial intelligence will far exceed the best human level in reasoning. He also said that soon there will be a comprehensive, pure general artificial intelligence solution for fully autonomous driving for the first time, which only requires cameras and Tesla AI chips, as well as Tesla AI software. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings increased its holdings of 10 BTC last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings, known as Hong Kong Stock Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), increased its holdings of 10 BTC last week, strengthening the company's asset allocation strategy. It now holds a total of 28.88 BTC.

data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings Increases Bitcoin Holdings to 28.88 BTC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong-listed company Hong Asia Holdings, often compared to MicroStrategy, has recently acquired an additional 10 BTC. This move further strengthens the company's asset allocation strategy, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 28.88 BTC.

data.title: Flow Traders and three other institutions may be market makers for Binance Megadrop’s new coin KERNEL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, Flow Traders, Auros Global and Arrington Capital may be the three major market makers for the new coin KERNEL launched on Binance Megadrop, and they were allocated 3.5 million, 3.5 million and 10 million tokens respectively, accounting for 10.47% of the total circulation.

data.title: Huobi HTX has launched KERNEL perpetual contract
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Huobi HTX has launched KERNEL/USDT perpetual contracts on April 14, with a maximum leverage of 20 times. At the same time, Huobi HTX held a KERNEL contract trading party from 22:00 on April 14 to 22:00 on April 21 (UTC+8), with a total prize pool of 10,000 US dollars.
Users who have never traded contracts can complete KERNEL/USDT contract transactions, and their personal cumulative transaction volume is ≥100 USDT, and they can receive $HTX equivalent to 3 USDT (a total of 3,000 USDT equivalent to $HTX in the prize pool); 2 users participate in KERNEL/USDT contract transactions, and the cumulative effective transaction volume is ≥10,000 USDT, and they can share $HTX equivalent to 7,000 USDT according to the transaction volume ranking.

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes rose at the opening, and Strategy rose 2.74%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: At the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.98%, the S&P 500 rose 1.6%, the Nasdaq rose 2.4%, Strategy rose 2.74%, and Coinbase rose 2.48%.
In addition, large technology stocks rose across the board, with Nvidia (NVDA.O) rising nearly 3%, Apple (AAPL.O) rising nearly 7%, Intel (INTC.O) rising nearly 4%, and Tesla (TSLA.O) rising more than 3%. Goldman Sachs (GS.N) rose more than 3%, and its Q1 stock business revenue exceeded market expectations.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 590 USDT with a Narrowed 0.33% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 14, 2025, 13:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 590 USDT and is now trading at 589.700012 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.33% increase in 24 hours.
